data.title: XRP Skyrockets to New All-Time High and Analysts Believe It’s Just Getting Started

data.title: Kraken launches CME Bitcoin and Ethereum futures contracts in the U.S.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Kraken officially launched CME Bitcoin and Ethereum futures contract trading services in the United States on Thursday, marking its first entry into the U.S. compliant derivatives market. The move coincided with the U.S. Congress passing two landmark digital asset bills, GENIUS and CLARITY. The new regulations will bring a clearer regulatory framework to the industry, while further consolidating the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) as the main regulator.
At the same time, the U.S. SEC has officially withdrawn its enforcement actions against three major crypto companies including Kraken. (Decrypt)

data.title: BTC Digital ditches Bitcoin for Ethereum in ‘transformative’ shift
data.description:
The mining firm has raised $6 million and is set to dump Bitcoin in favor of Ethereum, targeting tens of millions in ETH reserves by year-end.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/btc-digital-announces-pivot-to-ethereum-in-strategic-shift?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The crypto market rose across the board, MAG7.ssi rose by more than 6%, and the PayFi sector rose by 17.06%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, three cryptocurrency bills were passed by the House of Representatives, and all sectors of the crypto market rose, with a general increase of about 2% to 6%. Among them, the PayFi sector rose sharply by 17.06% in 24 hours, driven by the positive news that the "Genius Act" was passed and is expected to be signed by Trump on Friday. Within the sector, Stellar (XLM) and XRP rose by 11.42% and 18.15% respectively. In addition, ETH rose by 5.85%, breaking through $3,500.
It is worth noting that as the core component currency of MAG7.ssi, the strong upward movement of XRP and ETH has driven MAG7.ssi to continue to rise. As of press time, the 24-hour increase reached 6.37%, approaching the 0.98 USDT mark. In addition, DEFI.ssi rose by 6.49% and MEME.ssi rose by 2.56%.
In other sectors, the Layer2 sector rose by 5.73%, and within the sector, Mantle (MNT) rose by 11.86%; the DeFi sector rose by 4.56%, among which Uniswap (UNI), Ondo Finance (ONDO), and Chainlink (LINK) rose by 13.01%, 13.31%, and 13.69% respectively; the Layer1 sector rose by 4.31%, Cardano (ADA), and Hedera (HBAR) rose by 14.24% and 24.44% respectively; the Meme sector rose by 2.95%, Fartcoin (FARTCOIN), and Dogecoin (DOGE) rose by 9.53% and 9.86% respectively; the CeFi sector rose by 1.70%.
The crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector shows that the ssiPayFi, ssiDeFi, and ssiRWA indexes rose by 17.92%, 8.44%, and 6.91% in 24 hours respectively.

data.title: Backpack now opens FTX bond sales channel
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Backpack posted on the X platform that it has officially opened the FTX debt sales channel, and users can complete the entire process on the platform: real-name authentication, debt verification, quotation confirmation, and settlement payment.
Backpack will not charge any fees during the entire process, and said, "To help other users who still hold FTX debt, we will launch a non-profit, completely neutral debt sales channel from now on to help FTX global debt holders connect with third-party buyers willing to acquire FTX debt."

data.title: Ondo Finance: Treasury tokenized product USDY is about to be launched on Sei Network
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, RWA tokenization platform Ondo Finance announced that its flagship product, the United States Dollar Yield (USDY), will be officially launched on the Sei network, becoming the first on-chain treasury bond asset deployed on this ultra-high-speed Layer1 blockchain.
USDY is currently deployed on multiple blockchains, with a TVL of more than US$680 million, providing an annualized yield of 4.25% (updated monthly), targeting individual and institutional investors around the world (excluding the United States), combining the liquidity advantages of stablecoins with the high-level investor protection mechanism in traditional finance.

data.title: The total market value of stablecoins exceeds 260 billion US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coingecko data shows that the total market value of stablecoins has exceeded 260 billion US dollars, temporarily reported at 266,231,633,125 US dollars, a 24-hour increase of 0.8%, and a 24-hour trading volume of 187,946,198,569 US dollars. Among them, Tether (USDT) has a market value of more than 160 billion US dollars, ranking first; USDC has a market value of more than 64.8 billion US dollars, ranking second.

data.title: Substack raises $100 million in new funding, with a valuation of $1.1 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Substack, a paid content subscription platform, recently completed a $100 million financing, with the latest valuation reaching $1.1 billion. This round of financing was led by BOND and Chernin Group, and participated by Andreessen Horowitz, Klutch Sports Group founder Rich Paul, and Skims Body Inc. co-founder Jens Grede.
Substack was founded in 2017 and has been supported by well-known investment institutions including Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Y Combinator, and Fifty Years. Currently, the number of paid subscribers has exceeded 5 million, and it has expanded to content formats such as podcasts and videos. (Bloomberg)

data.title: OG bitcoin whale moves remaining 40,191 BTC to Galaxy Digital for potential sale
data.description:
The Satoshi-era whale's 80,000 BTC surged over 15. 4 million percent since April 2011, from $62,400 to $9. 6 billion.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/363286/og-bitcoin-whale-moves-remaining-btc-galaxy?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin is still in the middle of the adoption wave, and its trend can be compared to the Internet popularity curve
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Jurrien Timmer, global macro director at Fidelity, compared Bitcoin to the Internet wave and emphasized that Bitcoin's growth trajectory is highly similar to the Internet's popularity curve over the past few decades.
Timmer said, "Bitcoin is still following the power law curve of the number of wallets and the demand model I built based on Internet penetration. We are in the middle of the entire curve."
The analysis pointed out that the current "step-up + consolidation" trend of Bitcoin prices still reflects that this is a maturing but not yet saturated asset class.
Regarding the influx of funds, Timmer commented that it is not clear whether these funds come from long-term believers or short-term speculators. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Rise As Crucial Crypto Bills Sail Through The US House: Analytics Firm Sees 20%-25% Upside For BTC Before Profit-Taking Kicks In
data.description:
Leading cryptocurrencies rose on Thursday as the House of Representatives passed crucial bills aimed at ending regulatory ambiguity in the industry. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/25/07/46484730/bitcoin-ethereum-dogecoin-rise-as-crucial-crypto-bills-sail-through-the-us-house-analytics-firm-sees-20-25-upside-for-btc-before-profit-taking-kicks-in?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Story appoints first Chief AI Officer to promote integration of AI and native IP
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Story officially announced the appointment of Dr. Sandeep as Chief AI Officer, who will be fully responsible for AI strategy formulation, key project incubation and ecological technology guidance, and promote the integration and implementation of AI and Web3 native IP. 
Sandeep is currently a professor at the University of Texas at Austin. He holds a Ph.D. in AI and distributed systems from Stanford University. His research areas include generative AI, robotic systems and distributed systems. He previously worked as a researcher at NASA and participated in the establishment of a startup acquired by VMware. He has rich cross-border scientific research and engineering experience. 
This appointment coincides with the release of Story's Chapter 2 development roadmap. Story plans to build a real-world data rights confirmation and circulation infrastructure for the AI era, and undertake up to $70 trillion in global IP market opportunities.

data.title: Wall Street's Big Short: Corporate Bitcoin Treasury Craze Is Replaying SPAC-Style Bubble Risk
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Wall Street short Jim Chanos has now sounded the alarm about the hot phenomenon of corporate Bitcoin treasuries, which Chanos likened to the frenzy of SPACs (special purpose acquisition companies) in 2021, when $90 billion was raised in just three months, and then ended in a tragic crash.
But this time, the difference is that public companies are buying Bitcoin by issuing convertible bonds and preferred stocks without doing other substantive business.
"What we are seeing in the Bitcoin treasury market now is exactly the same as the SPAC madness in 2021," Chanos said in a podcast this week, "There are pretty big announcements almost every day-'hundreds of millions every night'."

data.title: Binance: Zero Fee Offer for Third-Party Custody Services Will Last Until December 31, 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that three-party custody has become an officially launched, fully operational solution. Three-party custody is an institutional custody solution that can keep fiat currency and traditional financial (TradFi) collateral in regulated third-party banks while allowing users to trade on Binance. The latest version lowers the entry threshold, does not require a trading volume commitment, and waives service fees for pledged funds on December 31, 2025.
It is reported that Binance three-party bank custody is a high-trust custody framework built for institutions. It allows customers to keep more traditional collateral assets (such as fiat currency and US Treasuries) in exclusive corporate accounts at third-party regulated banks without transferring these assets to trading platforms. At the same time, customers can still obtain an equal amount of trading quota on Binance to conduct transactions.
